## Testing

- [ ] Ran `npm run check` for code/config changes, or `npm run format:check` for docs-only/governance-only changes
- [ ] Manually tested the affected flow, or no manual testing was needed
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes, or no test update was needed

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is focused and inside the documented product scope
- [ ] Docs were updated for behavior, architecture, setup, or process changes, or no doc update was needed
- [ ] Screenshots/GIFs are attached for visible UI changes, or this PR has no visible UI change
- [ ] Risky areas are called out if touched: manifest, runtime messages, import/export, datasources, storage
